label: Jealous
description: Painful alertness to possible loss, displacement, betrayal, or comparison.
check: Is something precious feeling at risk?

label: Cautious
check: Is this protective watchfulness more than jealousy itself?

label: Clinging
description: Holding tightly from fear of loss.
check: Do I want to hold on tighter?

label: Clutching
description: Like clinging, but sometimes even more urgent or desperate.
check: Does this feel almost panicked attachment?

label: Mistrustful
description: Difficulty feeling secure in another's intentions.

label: Fear of losing someone/something
check: Is loss fear the center of it all?

label: Possessive
description: Wanting exclusive hold or control out of insecurity or attachment.
check: Is ownership or exclusivity showing up?

label: Suspicious
description: Assuming or fearing hidden threat, betrayal, or deception.
check: Is your mind looking for evidence?

label: Self-protective
thinking: I need to protect my heart.

label: Wary
description: Cautious because something may not be safe.
check: Is it quiet guardedness rather than active jealousy?

label: Watchful
thinking: I'm keeping an eye on this.
check: Am I scanning rather than reacting strongly?
